title: Garlicky Crumbly Mexican Sausage Tacos
description: A quick-fix Oaxacan dish featuring Italian fennel sausages, caramelize onions, and a keto-friendly twist. Perfect for a flavorful and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until caramelized and golden brown (about 8-10 minutes).
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the Italian fennel sausages to the skillet, breaking them up with a spoon as they cook, until no longer pink (about 5-7 minutes).
Stir in the Mexican crema, lime juice, salt, and pepper. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the sausage and onion mixture onto a tortilla, topping with crumbled Queso fresco, and garnishing with chopped cilantro.
Optional: add diced avocado, sliced radishes, or diced tomatoes for extra flavor and texture.
